svg.title: Agentic DoDAF 2.0 Full Pipeline
svg.desc: Full multi-agent DoDAF 2.0 pipeline showing user input, router, principal orchestrator, DoDAF 6-stage pipeline, JCIDS pipeline, DAU SE pipeline, formal outputs, and end-to-end traceability.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user submit into the DoDAF pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of documents enter the DoDAF pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the document router classify inputs?')
sendPrompt('What does the Principal Orchestrator do in K9-AIF?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 1 F2P Gate?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 2 Architecture Scope?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 3 Operational Data?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 4 System and Service Views?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 5 Performance and Standards?')
sendPrompt('What happens in Stage 6 Final Outputs?')
sendPrompt('What is the ICD input to the JCIDS pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What are CDD and CPD in the JCIDS pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What are KPP and KSA bundles?')
sendPrompt('What are DOTmLPF-P assessments?')
sendPrompt('What are traceability artifacts in JCIDS?')
sendPrompt('What does the DAU Systems Engineering pipeline produce?')
sendPrompt('What is the SRD in systems engineering?')
sendPrompt('What is the SPS in systems engineering?')
sendPrompt('What is TEMP in systems engineering?')
sendPrompt('What are TPMs in systems engineering?')
sendPrompt('What formal outputs does each pipeline produce for decision-making?')
sendPrompt('How does K9-AIF ensure end-to-end traceability across pipelines?')
g.text: End-to-end traceability: Architecture → Capability → Systems engineering
